interactions.summary: Jiang says NATO theatrics do not alter U.S. command, predicts German and American draft movement, explains fragging and sabotage as morale risks, then answers an Israel-racial-supremacy question by reading Kabbalah through Adam Kadmon and animal-soul hierarchy.
interactions.speaker_attribution: Sneako asks or frames the issue; Jiang answers in the main analytic voice where present.

speaker_notes.note: Machine diarization is consistent in this packet: SPEAKER_00 is Sneako/interviewer and SPEAKER_01 is Jiang, except where intro/outro material is host-only.

claims.claim: Jiang predicts Germany will move toward a draft for Ukraine and Middle East support, and says America may follow with low morale and possible sabotage among young men sent to war.
He says America has dominated the world more quickly and completely than Pax Britannica because Britain still had to share power with rival great powers.
He argues racial supremacy in Israel is not merely conspiracy but has a theological root in a literal reading where only 600,000 Jewish divine roots are fully human.

signature_moments.moment: Fragging returns as a warning that soldiers may attack officers rather than die in a war they reject.
signature_moments.source_phrase: american soldiers will kill the commanding officers
signature_moments.why_it_matters: It grounds draft resistance in military history, not only street protest.

glossary_terms.definition_or_usage: Vietnam-era term Jiang uses for soldiers killing commanding officers they believe will put them at risk.
Kabbalistic first-man figure in Jiang’s explanation of divine roots and soul hierarchy.
